_meta.description: Flowdometer package object schema — designed as LLM context for understanding what fields exist, how objects relate, and what automation is in place.

_architecture.summary: Flowdometer is a Salesforce managed package that tracks how long records spend in each stage of a business process. It polls field-history on a tracked object's field and creates structured time-series data.
_architecture.objectHierarchy: Listener__c → Flow__c → Step__c (one Listener spawns many Flows; each Flow contains an ordered chain of Steps)
_architecture.dualRecordTypePattern: Both Flow__c and Step__c use two record types — 'Tracker' (actual observed data) and 'Goal' (target benchmarks). A Tracker Flow can reference a Goal Flow, and each Tracker Step can reference a Goal Step, enabling vs-goal comparisons.
dataFlowNarrative: 1. Admin creates a Listener__c record specifying which object + field to track (e.g. Opportunity.StageName).
2. A scheduled Flow polls field-history records since the Listener's last check.
3. For each tracked record, a Flow__c (Tracker) is created or updated.
4. Each field-value change becomes a Step__c linked to its Flow, forming an ordered chain (Last_Step ← current → Next_Step).
5. Steps record timestamps (InitialTS__c, EndingTS__c) and calculate handle time in days, hours, weekdays, and business hours.
6. Goal Flows/Steps define target durations; Tracker Steps compare actual handle time against their Goal Step to compute breach times and progress bars.

_relationships.Step__c.Flow__c: Master-Detail to Flow__c (cascade delete, sharing controlled by parent)
_relationships.Step__c.Next_Step__c: Lookup to Step__c — forward link in the step chain
_relationships.Step__c.Last_Step__c: Lookup to Step__c — backward link in the step chain
_relationships.Step__c.Step_Goal__c: Lookup to Step__c (Goal record type) — the benchmark this tracker step is measured against
_relationships.Flow__c.Goal__c: Lookup to Flow__c (Goal record type) — the benchmark this tracker flow is measured against
_relationships.Flow__c.Most_Recent_Step__c: Lookup to Step__c — denormalized pointer to the latest step

Tracked_Object__c.label: Tracked Object
Tracked_Object__c.description: API name of the Salesforce object being tracked (e.g. 'Opportunity', 'Case').
Tracked_Object__c.helpText: API Name of the Object being tracked

Tracked_Field_Name__c.label: Tracked Field Name
Tracked_Field_Name__c.description: API name of the field whose changes are tracked (e.g. 'StageName', 'Status').
Tracked_Field_Name__c.helpText: API Name of the field where changes are tracked

Tracked_Object_ID__c.label: Tracked Object ID
Tracked_Object_ID__c.description: The 18-character Salesforce ID of the specific record this Flow is monitoring.

Tracked_Object_Link__c.label: Tracked Object Link
Tracked_Object_Link__c.description: Clickable link to the tracked record.

Name_of_Tracked_Record__c.label: Name of Tracked Record
Name_of_Tracked_Record__c.description: Display name of the tracked record, stored for reporting convenience.

Type__c.label: Type
Type__c.description: Optional classifier for sub-categories within the same object+field combination. E.g. 'New Business' vs 'Renewal' on Opportunity.StageName. Enables separate goal-setting per type.
Type__c.helpText: Used to split different types of processes handled within the same object.

Account__c.label: Account
Account__c.description: Optional link to the related Account.

Contact__c.label: Contact
Contact__c.description: Optional link to the related Contact.

Lead__c.label: Lead
Lead__c.description: Optional link to the related Lead.

Opportunity__c.label: Opportunity
Opportunity__c.description: Optional link to the related Opportunity.

Case__c.label: Case
Case__c.description: Optional link to the related Case.

Goal__c.label: Goal Flow
Goal__c.description: Self-referential lookup pointing to a Goal-record-type Flow. This is the benchmark this Tracker Flow is measured against.
Goal__c.relationshipLabel: Tracker Flows with this Goal Flow

Most_Recent_Step__c.label: Most Recent Step
Most_Recent_Step__c.description: Denormalized pointer to the latest Step in this Flow. Used by many formula fields to surface current-step data at the Flow level.

isGoal__c.label: Is Goal?
isGoal__c.description: True when this Flow uses the Goal record type.

Match_Goal_with_Flows__c.label: Match Goal with Historical Trackers?
Match_Goal_with_Flows__c.description: When checked on a Goal Flow, triggers automation to connect it to any existing Tracker Flows that match on Object, Field, and (optionally) Type.

Flow_Creation_Date__c.label: Flow Creation Date
Flow_Creation_Date__c.description: Earliest Step start timestamp across all Steps in this Flow — effectively when the tracked record first entered the process.

FlowCreatedDate__c.label: Flow Creation Date or CREATED
FlowCreatedDate__c.description: Favors the roll-up creation date but falls back to the record's CreatedDate. Used as the canonical 'process start' timestamp in time calculations.

Flow_Completion_Date__c.label: Flow Completion Date
Flow_Completion_Date__c.type: Roll-Up Summary (MAX of Step__c.InitialTS__c, filtered to terminal steps)
Flow_Completion_Date__c.description: Latest date a terminal Step was reached — effectively when the process completed.

Flow_Completion_Date_or_NOW__c.label: Flow Completion Date or NOW
Flow_Completion_Date_or_NOW__c.description: Falls back to NOW() for in-progress flows. Used in elapsed-time calculations.

First_Step_Taken_at__c.label: First Step Taken At
First_Step_Taken_at__c.description: Earliest timestamp any Step ended — marks when the first transition happened.

FirstStepOrNOW__c.label: First Step Taken At or NOW
FirstStepOrNOW__c.description: Falls back to NOW() if no steps have completed yet. Used in response-time calculations.

Steps_in_Flow__c.label: Steps in Flow
Steps_in_Flow__c.description: Total number of Steps in this Flow.

Days_Open_Since_Creation__c.label: Days Open Since Creation
Days_Open_Since_Creation__c.description: Calendar days from process start to completion (or to now if still open).

Hours_Since_Created__c.label: Hours Open Since Created
Hours_Since_Created__c.description: Same as Days_Open_Since_Creation__c expressed in hours.

Days_to_first_Step__c.label: Response Time (days)
Days_to_first_Step__c.description: Calendar days from process start to the first field-value change. Key responsiveness metric.

Days_to_first_Step_Weekdays__c.label: Response Time (weekdays)
Days_to_first_Step_Weekdays__c.formulaNote: Uses the standard NETWORKDAYS weekday-counting pattern (floors to whole weekdays).

HandleTimeToCurrent__c.label: Handle Time To Current Step
HandleTimeToCurrent__c.description: Sum of finalized handle times for all completed Steps. Does not include the currently active step.

Total_Handle_Time__c.label: Cycle Time (days)
Total_Handle_Time__c.description: Total handle time including the current step. If the process is complete (terminal), uses only finalized times; if still in progress, adds the current step's running handle time.

Cycle_Time_Weekdays__c.label: Cycle Time (weekdays)
Cycle_Time_Weekdays__c.description: Total cycle time counting only weekdays.

Days_since_Completion__c.label: Days Since Completion
Days_since_Completion__c.formula: IF(NOT(ISBLANK(Flow_Completion_Date__c)), IF(Flow_Completion_Date__c < NOW(), NOW() - Flow_Completion_Date__c, null), null)
Days_since_Completion__c.description: Days elapsed since the process completed. Null if still open. Useful for data-retention policies.

GoalCycleTime__c.label: Goal Cycle Time
GoalCycleTime__c.description: Total target cycle time for the process, summed from all Goal Steps.

Handle_Time_vs_Goal__c.label: Cycle Time vs Goal
Handle_Time_vs_Goal__c.formula: Actual cycle time / GoalCycleTime (unit-aware: Hours, Days, or Weekdays based on Goal Step's GoalUnit__c)
Handle_Time_vs_Goal__c.description: Ratio of actual total handle time to the goal cycle time. Values < 1 mean ahead of goal; >= 1 means breached.

Progress_Bar_vs_Goal__c.label: Progress Bar vs Goal
Progress_Bar_vs_Goal__c.description: Visual progress bar comparing actual cycle time to goal. Shows colored bar if under goal, 'Breached' text if over.

Next_Breach_At__c.label: Next Breach At
Next_Breach_At__c.description: Surfaces the current step's breach deadline at the Flow level for list views and reports.

Created_by_Me__c.label: Created by Me?
Created_by_Me__c.description: True when the running user created this Flow. Useful for personal list-view filters.

Flow__c.label: Flow
Flow__c.description: Parent Flow. Cascade-delete applies. Sharing is controlled by the parent Flow.

Next_Step__c.label: Next Step
Next_Step__c.description: Forward link to the Step that followed this one. Null if this is the most recent (active) step.

Last_Step__c.label: Last Step
Last_Step__c.description: Backward link to the Step that preceded this one.

Step_Goal__c.label: Goal Step
Step_Goal__c.description: The Goal Step this Tracker Step is measured against. Filtered to only show Goal-record-type Steps.
Step_Goal__c.relationshipLabel: Tracker Steps with this Goal Step

Field_Value_Initial__c.label: Step
Field_Value_Initial__c.description: The field value when this Step started (e.g. 'Prospecting', 'New'). This is the value the record was in during this step.

Field_Value_Ending__c.label: Step After This
Field_Value_Ending__c.description: The field value this Step transitioned TO. Matches the next Step's Field_Value_Initial__c.

Sequence__c.label: Order
Sequence__c.description: Ordinal position in the Flow's step sequence. Incrementing values reflect the chronological order of field changes.

SequenceInitialFieldValue__c.label: Step Order and Value
SequenceInitialFieldValue__c.description: Concatenation of sequence number and step value — useful for sorted list views.

InitialTS__c.label: Step Started At
InitialTS__c.description: Timestamp when the tracked record entered this field value.

EndingTS__c.label: Step Ended At
EndingTS__c.description: Timestamp when the tracked record left this field value (transitioned to the next step). Null if step is currently active.

InitialTimestamp__c.label: Initial Timestamp or CREATED
InitialTimestamp__c.description: Favors InitialTS__c but falls back to CreatedDate. Used internally in handle-time formulas.

EndTimestamp__c.label: Ending Timestamp or NOW
EndTimestamp__c.description: Favors EndingTS__c but falls back to NOW() for active steps. Used internally in handle-time formulas.

StartDate__c.label: Step Started Date
StartDate__c.description: Date-only version of InitialTS__c. Used in weekday/breach calculations.

Terminal_Stage__c.label: Is Final Step?
Terminal_Stage__c.description: True when this is the final step in the process (e.g. Closed Won, Converted). Terminal steps stop the handle-time clock.

Success__c.label: Process Succeeded?
Success__c.description: On terminal steps: true if the outcome represents success (Closed Won, Completed, Approved). False for failures (Closed Lost, Cancelled).

StepActive__c.label: Step Is Currently Active?
StepActive__c.description: True when this step is the current active step — not a goal, not terminal, and no next step yet.

isGoal__c.label: Is Goal?
isGoal__c.description: True when this Step uses the Goal record type.

Step_Handle_Time__c.label: Handle Time (Days in this Step)
Step_Handle_Time__c.formula: EndingTS__c - InitialTS__c (or NOW() - InitialTS__c if still active; null if terminal with no next step)
Step_Handle_Time__c.description: Running or final handle time in calendar days. Null for terminal steps without successors (process is complete).

HandleTimeWeekend__c.label: Handle Time (over Weekend Days)
HandleTimeWeekend__c.description: The weekend portion of handle time (always <= 0 as an adjustment factor).

Final_Handle_Time__c.label: Final Handle Time (days)
Final_Handle_Time__c.description: Snapshot of handle time frozen when the step completes. Used in the parent Flow's roll-up summaries. Writable (set by automation).

Final_Handle_Time_Weekdays__c.label: Final Handle Time (weekdays)
Final_Handle_Time_Weekdays__c.description: Weekday-only version of Final_Handle_Time__c. Rounded to whole days.

Handle_Time_Business_Hours__c.label: Handle Time (Business Hours)
Handle_Time_Business_Hours__c.description: Handle time calculated using Salesforce Business Hours. Populated by the 'Flowdometer - Autocalculate Business Hours' Flow. Blank until that Flow is activated.

GoalHandleTimeHrs__c.label: Goal: Handle Time
GoalHandleTimeHrs__c.description: On Goal Steps: the target handle time for this stage, expressed in the units specified by GoalUnit__c.

GoalUnit__c.label: Goal: Handle Time Measured In (units)
GoalUnit__c.description: On Goal Steps: the unit of measure for GoalHandleTimeHrs__c.

HandleTimeVsGoal__c.label: Handle Time vs Goal
HandleTimeVsGoal__c.formula: Actual handle time / Goal handle time (unit-aware conversion)
HandleTimeVsGoal__c.description: Ratio of actual step handle time to the goal. Values > 100% indicate a breach.

GoalBreached__c.label: Goal Breached
GoalBreached__c.description: True when actual handle time exceeds the goal for this step.

BreachTime__c.label: Breach Happens At
BreachTime__c.formula: InitialTS__c + GoalHandleTimeHrs__c (converted from goal units; weekday-aware)
BreachTime__c.description: The calculated deadline — the DateTime at which this step will breach its goal if not completed.

TimeSinceBreach__c.label: Time Since Breach (in days)
TimeSinceBreach__c.description: Days elapsed since the breach deadline. Null for terminal/goal steps. Stops counting when the next step is reached.

TimeUntilBreach__c.label: Time Until Breach (in days)
TimeUntilBreach__c.description: Days remaining before the breach deadline. Only meaningful for active, non-terminal steps.

StepVsTotal__c.label: Step % of Cycle Time
StepVsTotal__c.formula: GoalHandleTimeHrs__c / Flow.GoalCycleTime__c (for goals) or Final_Handle_Time__c / Flow.HandleTimeToCurrent__c (for trackers)
StepVsTotal__c.description: What proportion of total cycle time this step represents — useful for identifying bottleneck stages.

NextStepVsGoalNextStep__c.label: Next Step vs Goal Next Step
NextStepVsGoalNextStep__c.formula: Compares this step's Field_Value_Ending__c against the Goal Step's Field_Value_Ending__c
NextStepVsGoalNextStep__c.description: Reports 'Matched goal' or 'Deviated from goal' — tracks whether the process followed the prescribed sequence.

ProgressBarElapsedColor__c.label: Progress Bar Elapsed Color
ProgressBarElapsedColor__c.description: Dynamic color resource URL for the elapsed portion of the progress bar.

ProgressBarRemainingColor__c.label: Progress Bar Remaining Color
ProgressBarRemainingColor__c.formula: Blank for terminal/goal, LightBlue for active, UnusedGray for completed
ProgressBarRemainingColor__c.description: Dynamic color resource URL for the remaining portion of the progress bar.

ProgressBarVsGoal__c.label: Progress Bar vs Goal
ProgressBarVsGoal__c.description: Visual progress bar showing handle time vs goal. Displays colored bar or 'Breached' text.

TrackedObjectType__c.label: Tracked Object Type
TrackedObjectType__c.description: Cross-object formula surfacing the parent Flow's tracked object name.

TrackedFieldName__c.label: Tracked Field Name
TrackedFieldName__c.description: Cross-object formula surfacing the parent Flow's tracked field name.

TrackedObjectLink__c.label: Tracked Object Link
TrackedObjectLink__c.description: Cross-object formula surfacing the parent Flow's tracked-record hyperlink.

Type__c.label: Type
Type__c.description: Cross-object formula surfacing the parent Flow's Type.

FlowGoalID__c.label: Goal Flow: ID
FlowGoalID__c.description: 18-char ID of this Step's parent Flow's Goal Flow. Used by automation to match tracker steps to goal steps.

History_Record_ID__c.label: History Record ID
History_Record_ID__c.description: ID of the FieldHistory record that created this Step. Used for deduplication.

History_Record_ID_for_Last_Step__c.label: History Record ID for Last Step
History_Record_ID_for_Last_Step__c.description: History record ID of the preceding Step. Used during step-chain construction.

Plan_Next_Steps__c.label: Plan/Next Steps
Plan_Next_Steps__c.description: Rich-text field for users to document their plan for progressing to the next stage.

CreatedByMe__c.label: Created By Me?
CreatedByMe__c.description: True when the running user created this Step.

Object_Name__c.label: Object To Track
Object_Name__c.description: API name of the Salesforce object to monitor (e.g. 'Opportunity', 'Lead').
Object_Name__c.helpText: Choose Object that has the field you'd like Tracked

Field_To_Track__c.label: Field To Track
Field_To_Track__c.description: API name of the field on the tracked object whose changes create Steps (e.g. 'StageName').
Field_To_Track__c.helpText: Choose Field (eg: Status or Stage) you'd like to track changes on

Type__c.label: Type
Type__c.description: Optional: API name of a field used to sub-classify tracked records into types for differentiated goal-setting. Use when you need different goals for different categories (e.g. 'RecordTypeId' or a formula field).
Type__c.helpText: OPTIONAL: Type should be blank unless you plan on having different goal times for different Types of this object.

TerminalStage__c.label: Terminal Stage
TerminalStage__c.description: Optional: API name of a Boolean formula field on the tracked object that returns true when the record is in its final state (e.g. 'IsClosed', 'IsConverted'). Used to mark Steps as terminal.
TerminalStage__c.helpText: Create a formula field that returns true when tracked field is in the last step of your process.

isActive__c.label: isActive
isActive__c.description: Toggle for pausing/resuming the listener without deleting the configuration.

Frequency__c.label: Frequency (Minutes)
Frequency__c.description: How often (in fractional hours stored as a decimal) the scheduled batch should poll for changes. Default ~8.3 minutes.

Last_Check__c.label: Last Check
Last_Check__c.description: Timestamp of the most recent poll. The next poll queries history records created after this timestamp.

Next_Check__c.label: Next Check
Next_Check__c.description: Calculated next-poll time based on Last_Check + Frequency.

Last_Execution_On__c.label: Last Execution On
Last_Execution_On__c.description: Timestamp of the last time the Apex/Flow processing code ran for this Listener.

Enable_History__c.label: Enable History
Enable_History__c.description: When true, the Listener will query historical field-change records (backfill). When false, only tracks changes going forward.

Unprocessed_History_Records__c.label: Unprocessed History Records
Unprocessed_History_Records__c.description: JSON buffer for history records that haven't been processed yet, enabling batched processing.

Error_Message__c.label: Latest Apex Error Message
Error_Message__c.description: Captures the most recent Apex error for troubleshooting.

Latest_Flow_Error_Message__c.label: Latest Flow Error Message
Latest_Flow_Error_Message__c.description: Captures the most recent Flow error for troubleshooting.

Is_Enabled__c.label: Is Enabled
Is_Enabled__c.description: Whether this feature is currently active.

Description__c.label: Description
Description__c.description: Human-readable description of what this feature flag controls.
